Eureka Static Resolver Demo Snapshots

These files are generated static publication examples.
They are not live search, not a live API, not backend hosting, and not production.
The reserved /api/v1 route family is future handoff contract only and is not live here.

Pages:
- query-plan-windows-7-apps.html: Query Plan: Windows 7 Apps
- result-member-driver-inside-support-cd.html: Member Result: Driver Inside Support CD
- result-firefox-xp.html: Result: Firefox XP Compatibility Evidence
- result-article-scan.html: Result: Article Inside Scan Fixture
- absence-example.html: Absence Example: Missing Target
- comparison-example.html: Comparison Example: ArchiveBox Fixture Records
- source-example.html: Source Example: Fixture and Placeholder Honesty
- eval-summary.html: Eval Summary Demo

Machine-readable data: data/demo_snapshots.json
